text.title: AI Code-Review Impact Suggestion Examples
text.summary: One worked example showing how an input flows through the decision tree to a validated artefact.

example.trigger: PR changes 3 files in `billing/`; review starts.
example.walkthrough: graph_available=true → coverage_available=true → pr_trivial=false → comment posted with 7 transitive consumers + 2 hot-spots + coverage delta -3%.
